projects.name: Mission Control UI
projects.description: Next.js frontend for AevaOS Mission Control - dashboard, projects, tasks, office, auth
projects.notes: Feature-complete. All routes working. Uses mock data until API is live.

projects.name: Mission Control API
projects.description: Flask backend with JWT auth, PostgreSQL, projects/tasks CRUD
projects.notes: Code complete. Needs Railway env vars (SECRET_KEY, JWT_SECRET_KEY, CORS_ORIGINS) and database seeding.

projects.name: LifeTrack
projects.description: Digital Twin personality engine - current Flutter/Firebase, migrating to Node/Next.js
projects.notes: TASK-008 completed. IP documented in DIGITAL_TWIN_IP.md. Core algorithms extracted to @lifetrack/digital-twin-core package. Migration plan defined: 6-8 weeks to Next.js + Node.js + PostgreSQL.

projects.name: Digital Twin Core Package
projects.description: TypeScript package with pure Digital Twin algorithms (scoring, completion, context generation)
projects.notes: Zero dependencies. 90+ unit tests. Ready for Node.js integration. Located at /data/workspace/digital-twin-core/

projects.name: LifeOS Framework
projects.description: Open-source framework for the world - the public movement
projects.notes: Awaiting LifeTrack migration completion and AevaOS stabilization before starting.
